content.query:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold_merchant_revenue
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'gold_merchant_revenue/',
    DATA_SOURCE = MyDataLake,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
)
AS
SELECT
    merchant_id,
    txn_year,
    txn_month_name,
    SUM(amount) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(*) AS txn_count,
    AVG(amount) AS avg_ticket_size
FROM fact_transactions AS t
GROUP BY merchant_id, txn_year, txn_month_name;

select * from gold_merchant_revenue

drop external table gold_merchant_revenue
